evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build automated checks for freshness, completeness, consistency and accuracy, and establish testing standards
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: A dedicated 25% responsibility bucket for data quality, testing, and documentation with no velocity/speed language anywhere.
evidence.domain_risk: Work with some of the largest and most diverse datasets in UK media
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: UK media/advertising analytics affecting business decisions, with no financial reporting, audit, or regulatory language present.
evidence.collaboration_width: Data Engineering; Analytics; Business Intelligence; Data Science; Product; commercial stakeholders
evidence.data_team_maturity: so our analytical data can be used by Business Intelligence, Data Science and Analytics teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named, distinct data sub-teams (Data Engineering, Analytics, BI, Data Science) with established processes (Agile ceremonies, FinOps) indicate a mature data organization.
evidence.jd_authorship: Build automated checks for freshness, completeness, consistency and accuracy, and establish testing standards including schema, business rule and metric validation
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise percentage-weighted responsibility buckets, named tools (dbt, Snowflake, Airflow), and specific practices make the day-to-day work very clear.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Partner with Analytics, Product, Data Science and commercial stakeholders to translate requirements into robust data models
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Responsibilities split fairly evenly between internal data consumers (BI, Data Science) and product/commercial stakeholders, so no single orientation dominates.
evidence.autonomy_level: develop reusable semantic layers, metrics and core entities
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role owns core data product design (strategic) while also executing specific stakeholder-driven modelling requests (execution).
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: establish testing standards including schema, business rule and metric validation
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is a dedicated, owned responsibility bucket (25% of role) with explicit ownership verbs, not just a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Build automated checks for freshness, completeness, consistency and accuracy
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: reliability and data quality concerns are prominent but framed as delivery/craft quality rather than regulatory or stakeholder-trust risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, build and maintain scalable, reusable, well-documented data models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of build/design (greenfield) and maintain (fix_scale) verbs with no dominant single direction.
